name: Cultural Wonders & Beach Paradise: Vietnam, Cambodia & Bali Journey 16 days
duration: Places:Siem Reap - Hanoi - Halong Bay - Ho Chi Minh City - Indochina
highlights: Explore the magnificent Angkor Wat complex, Ta Prohm’s jungle-clad ruins, and the hidden treasures of Cambodia’s countryside.
Cruise overnight in Ha Long Bay, marveling at limestone cliffs, glowing caves, and serene sunsets on the water.
Discover the contrasts of Vietnam, from Hanoi’s old-world charm to Ho Chi Minh City’s dynamic energy and the rustic beauty of the Mekong Delta.
Unwind in Bali with visits to volcanic highlands, Nusa Penida’s dramatic coastlines, and days of relaxation on pristine beaches.

itinerary.title: Siem Reap Arrival - Pick up from Airport
itinerary.description: Upon landing at Siem Reap International Airport, you will be warmly greeted by our local guide and driver, who will assist with your transfer to the hotel. Check in your hotel and take some time to unwind after your journey. The remainder of the day is yours at leisure, allowing you to adjust at your own pace before beginning your full exploration tomorrow.

itinerary.title: Discover Angkor Temple Full Day Tour
itinerary.description:
Morning

Begin your adventure with a tuk-tuk ride to the ancient city of Angkor Thom, the final capital of the Khmer Empire. Within its massive stone gates lies the majestic Bayon Temple, where 39 serene towers adorned with enigmatic smiling faces gaze down upon visitors, creating a sense of awe and mystery. Continue your journey through Angkor Thom to admire the intricate bas-reliefs at the Terrace of the Elephants and the Terrace of the Leper King, which vividly depict royal processions, battles, and celestial beings. Hidden within the former Royal Palace grounds, you may also discover rarel...

itinerary.title: Siem Reap - Village Tour - Kampong Phluck
itinerary.description:
Morning

Your day begins with a 25-minute drive to Ta Brak Village, where you are warmly welcomed into the rhythm of rural Cambodian life. Sharing a simple western-packed breakfast with a local family, you’ll exchange stories and smiles, gaining firsthand insights into their daily traditions and community spirit. From here, climb aboard an ox cart for a leisurely 30-minute ride to a lively local market, where the air buzzes with chatter and the aroma of fresh herbs, spices, and tropical fruits. Continue with a 1 km walk through the countryside, passing rice fields and sugar palm trees that for...

itinerary.title: Siem Reap Fly to Hanoi - Street Food Tour
itinerary.description:
After your flight from Siem Reap, arrive in Vietnam’s capital and prepare to dive straight into its lively culinary culture. Evening

At around 17:30, our guide will greet you in front of Shinhan Bank at 14 Le Thai To Street, Hang Trong Ward, Hoan Kiem District and lead you into the bustling alleyways of the Hanoi Old Quarter, a maze of narrow streets filled with sizzling woks, fragrant broths, and the hum of evening life. Begin your journey with Vietnam’s most beloved comfort foods - Pho Bo (Vietnamese Beef Noodles), Bun Thang (Rice Vermicelli Noodles with Chicken and Egg), or the rich, spicy...

itinerary.title: Hanoi City Tour Half Day
itinerary.description: In this Hanoi City Tour Half Day, you may choose whether Morning tour (08:00 - 12:00) or Afternoon tour (13:00 - 17:00). Please gather in your hotel lobby at 08:00 or 13:00, where our guide will provide a warm introduction before beginning your journey through Hanoi’s historic and cultural heart. Begin with a visit to the Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum Complex, where you will learn about the life and legacy of Vietnam’s most beloved leader. Stroll through the peaceful gardens to view his humble house-on-stilts, admire the grandeur of the Presidential Palace, and gain insight into the values that shaped...

itinerary.title: Ninh Binh Full Day Tour (Hoa Lu - Tam Coc)
itinerary.description:
Morning

At 07:30 - 08:00, our guide will meet you at your hotel and take you on a scenic 120 km journey through Vietnam’s lush countryside aboard a comfortable Limousine bus. Arriving at Hoa Lu Ancient Citadel around 10:30, step back in time to the 10th century when this site was the very first capital of Vietnam. Recognized by UNESCO as a cultural heritage destination, Hoa Lu is where the nation’s earliest dynasties defended their independence. You will also explore the venerable Dinh King Temple, dating back to the 17th century, adorned with intricate wood and stone carvings that reflect th...

itinerary.title: Hanoi - Halong Bay Cruise
itinerary.description:
Morning

At 08:00 - 08:30, a driver will collect you from your hotel in Hanoi Old Quarter and take you along the modern Hanoi - Hai Phong Expressway toward the Gulf of Tonkin. The journey sets the stage for an unforgettable adventure as you approach the emerald waters and majestic limestone karsts of Halong Bay. Upon arrival, step aboard your luxurious Ha Long Bay Cruise, where a welcome drink awaits. While sipping, listen to a warm introduction, cruise briefing, and essential safety instructions. Soon, enjoy a delectable lunch at the onboard restaurant as the vessel glides past dramatic karst...

itinerary.title: Halong Bay - Hanoi - Fly to Ho Chi Minh City
itinerary.description:
Morning

Around 06:30 - 07:00, rise early at dawn to witness the mesmerizing sunrise from the deck of your Halong Bay Cruise. A light breakfast of pastries, coffee, and tea will be served in the dining room, setting the tone for a refreshing day ahead. After breakfast, take part in a serene Tai Chi class on deck, gently stretching your body while inhaling the fresh sea air. This energizing activity perfectly complements the tranquil beauty of the bay, preparing you for the morning’s adventure. The cruise then anchors at Titop Island, a crescent-shaped gem renowned for its powdery white sand an...
itinerary.accommodation: Hotel in Ho Chi Minh City

itinerary.title: Cu Chi Tunnels - Ho Chi Minh City Tour
itinerary.description:
Morning

At 08:00, begin the morning with a scenic 2-hour drive out of the city toward the legendary Cu Chi Tunnels, an underground labyrinth that once served as a “secret city” for the Vietnamese army during the war. Before exploring, you will watch a short documentary that unveils the history and ingenuity behind these tunnels. Then, descend into this remarkable network, where narrow passageways, hidden chambers, and clever trap systems reveal the resilience and determination of the Vietnamese fighters. Afterward, enjoy a light lunch of regional dishes before heading back into the heart of H...
itinerary.accommodation: Hotel in Ho Chi Minh City

itinerary.title: Insight Mekong Delta Full Day
itinerary.description:
Morning

Around 07:00 - 7:30, leave the bustle of Saigon behind as you journey toward Ben Tre Province, known as the “land of coconuts” and a gateway into the lush landscapes of the Mekong Delta. Along the drive, the scenery shifts from busy city streets to endless rice fields, canals, and rural villages, offering a glimpse of Southern Vietnam’s authentic countryside life. Your adventure begins with a tranquil cruise along the Ham Luong River, one of the nine tributaries that form the legendary Mekong Delta. Glide across the calm waters while soaking in the gentle breezes and observing fishing...
itinerary.accommodation: Hotel in Ho Chi Minh City

itinerary.title: Ho Chi Minh Fly to Bali
itinerary.description:
Morning

After breakfast, bid farewell to the vibrant energy of Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam’s bustling southern metropolis where historic boulevards and modern skyscrapers intertwine. Transfer to the airport for your international flight to Bali, Indonesia, the island of timeless beauty. Upon arrival at the airport, you will be greeted by our local guide and driver, who will assist with your transfer to the hotel.

itinerary.title: Full Day Kintamani Volcano Tour
itinerary.description:
Morning

After breakfast, your journey begins at Batubulan Village, where traditional handmade Batik Painting comes to life in vibrant colors and intricate patterns. Watch artisans skillfully transform plain fabric into storytelling canvases, each design reflecting Balinese culture and spirituality. Continue to Mas Village, a renowned center for painting and wood carving. Here, the rhythmic tapping of chisels and the scent of freshly carved wood fill the air as local artists bring sacred figures and cultural motifs to life with remarkable precision. Your next stop is at a Coffee Plantation, se...

itinerary.title: Nusa Penida Island Tour
itinerary.description:
Morning

After breakfast, transfer to Sanur Beach to board a public fast boat crossing the Bali Sea toward Nusa Penida. The morning ride offers refreshing sea breezes and shimmering waters, setting the tone for a day of discovery. The boat departs at 07:00 or 08:00, then around 09:30, you will arrive at Toyapakeh Pier, the gateway to this island paradise. Your adventure begins at Angel Billabong, a natural infinity pool carved by the ocean where turquoise waters glisten under the sun. The sight of waves crashing dramatically against the rocks, then flowing into this hidden lagoon, creates a br...

itinerary.title: Tanjung Benoa Water Sports
itinerary.description:
Morning

After breakfast, at 09:00, depart from your hotel to Tanjung Benoa Beach, the center of Bali’s marine adventures. Enjoy your Water Sport package, including:

One round Banana Boat ride

Glass-bottom boat ride to Turtle Island, where you’ll discover a turtle conservation area and observe these gentle creatures up close. (Other optional water sports - parasailing adventure, jet ski, flying fish, snorkeling, sea walker, diving, sky tube, etc. - are available at your own expense.)

Transfer to a local restaurant and savor a delicious Indonesian set lunch. Afternoon – Choose One Option:

O...

itinerary.title: Free Day - Bali Beach Leisure
itinerary.description: Wake up to the calming sounds of the waves and enjoy a leisurely breakfast with a view of Bali’s beaches, where the ocean glimmers in the morning light. This is a perfect moment to reflect on your journey, capture final seaside photographs, or simply sit back and soak in the tropical serenity. Spend your time in true relaxation - walk along the soft sands, dip your toes into the refreshing sea, or savor the island’s laid-back vibe before continuing on your journey. The combination of tranquil surroundings and gentle sea breeze ensures your farewell to Bali is both peaceful and memorable.

itinerary.title: Bali Departure
itinerary.description: After enjoying your final breakfast at the hotel, take in the calming tropical atmosphere of Bali, where the sound of gentle waves and the warmth of the morning sun provide a serene farewell. This last moment of leisure allows you to reflect on the unforgettable experiences and vibrant culture that have colored your journey. When the time comes, you will be transferred to the airport. As you make your way through the airport, carry with you the essence of the island - the golden beaches, sacred temples, lush rice terraces, and the heartfelt smiles of its people - ensuring that the spirit of Ba...

included: Accommodation in TWN/ DBL sharing accommodation at hotel, except sharing cabin on train and overnight at local homestay
All transport within Vietnam (including airport pick up and see off), as per itinerary
All in-tour stationed local English-speaking guide.
Entrance fees for Vietnam attractions, as per itinerary
Meals as indicated in the program
03 flights: Siem Reap - Hanoi, Hanoi - HCMC, HCMC - Bali
